name: American Poolplayers Association
description: The largest amateur pool league organization in the United States, utilizing the Equalizer handicap system.

name: BCA Pool League
description: Operated by CueSports International (CSI), utilizing the FargoRate handicap system for 8-ball, 9-ball, and 10-ball.
championship_location: Rio All-Suite Hotel & Casino, Las Vegas

name: Valley National 8-Ball League Association
description: One of the world's largest amateur pool leagues, heavily associated with Valley bar tables and coin-operated amusement operators.

name: Association of Pool Players
description: An amateur league system focusing on strict rules and a proprietary handicap system.

name: North American Poolshooters Association
description: A player-focused league offering cash payouts, no annual dues, and a proprietary Elo rating system.
